videoSnippet.title: "Not.Good.Enough." || Matthias Blübaum vs Anish Giri || FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 R14
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Bluebaum, Matthias (2698) - Giri, Anish (2753)
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [14] 2026.04.15
D38 Queen's Gambit Declined, Ragozin variation

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 Bb4 5.Qa4+ Nc6 6.e3 O-O 7.Bd2 dxc4 8.Bxc4 Bd6 9.Ng5 a6 10.Qc2 h6 11.h4 Re8 12.a3 b5 13.Ba2 Bb7 14.O-O-O b4 15.d5 Nd4 16.exd4 bxc3 17.dxe6 cxd2+ 18.Qxd2 fxe6 19.Nxe6 Qc8 20.Qa5 Bd5 21.Bxd5 Nxd5 22.Nxg7 Kxg7 23.Qxd5 Qe6 24.Qxe6 Rxe6 25.g3 Rf8 26.Rd2 Ref6 27.Rf1 Rf3 28.Kd1 Rxg3
